## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Point the S01 retrieval interface at the newly built knowledge object library.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S01): Turn the static knowledge repository into an active decision-making system with mandatory retrieval, source citation, decision traces, memorialization, and a knowledge graph.

## THE ONE ACTION
Configure retrieval to read global_knowledge_objects.jsonl (multimodal-first) from knowledge_object_library/; demonstrate a real query returning objects from the new library.

## COMMAND(S) TO RUN
```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
print('BIND retrieval to knowledge_object_library/global_knowledge_objects.jsonl; run a real query; capture cited objects')
PY
```
